title: SequenceFile Management in MapReduce
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory manages 'FileEntry' objects in Hadoop's MapReduce. It uses 'EntryFileIO' for writing and reading entries to/from a SequenceFile. The 'EntryWriter' class, with a blocking queue and dedicated thread, exemplifies the Factory and Worker pattern. This directory collaborates with other classes for comprehensive file entry management.

TITLE: SequenceFile Management in MapReduce

DESCRIPTION: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory manages 'FileEntry' objects in Hadoop's MapReduce. It uses 'EntryFileIO' for writing and reading entries to/from a SequenceFile. The 'EntryWriter' class, with a blocking queue and dedicated thread, exemplifies the Factory and Worker pattern. This directory collaborates with other classes for comprehensive file entry management.
